extraction_note: Dark colour scheme confirmed by branding_json.colorScheme='dark' and background #111111/#1B1B1B dominance in components. branding_json.textPrimary='#111111' is incorrect — this is the background colour, not text; body text on dark backgrounds is #F0E8DA (confirmed in input.textColor). #2D463C (branding_json.colors.link) has no verifiable HTML inline or SVG occurrence in the provided source — demoted and excluded from palette. #416E63 (buttonSecondary.textColor) appears in branding_json.components only — included as secondary button text with json_components_button_secondary source. SVG fills include flag colours (#0052B4, #FFDA44, #C60C30, #EEEEEE, #BE1E2D) and icon colours (#78DCB4, #C8A45A, #128D5C, #12925F) — these are decorative national flag / badge icons and do not meet palette inclusion criteria (single-use, third-party flag imagery, not brand-defining). #78DCB4 appears as an icon fill on the 'Ingen binding' checkmark SVG — included as icon_color due to functional prominence as a brand UI signal. No CSS gradients or SVG linearGradient/radialGradient brand elements found in source. Font: Bricolage Grotesque Variable confirmed via branding_json.typography.fontFamilies; no Google Fonts link tag present in provided HTML source, but Tailwind/Next.js obfuscated class context assumed given framework=tailwind — marked as json_fonts. borderRadius '33554400px' in components is a CSS pill/full-radius value (equivalent to 9999px/fully rounded). branding_json.spacing.borderRadius='0px' applies to cards/sections, not buttons. Both values retained with appropriate context.

palette.name: Void Black
palette.usage: Primary canvas background for all dark-mode layouts, hero sections, and full-bleed infographic backgrounds

palette.name: Charcoal Surface
palette.usage: Elevated card surfaces, input fields, and UI component backgrounds sitting above the primary dark canvas

palette.name: Mint Green
palette.usage: Primary CTA button fills, key stat callouts, highlight text, accent rules, and any element requiring highest visual priority

palette.name: Warm Cream
palette.usage: Primary body text, input text, and paragraph content on dark backgrounds

palette.name: Dark Border
palette.usage: Input field borders, card dividers, and subtle UI separators on dark surfaces

palette.name: Button Label Black
palette.usage: Text colour on mint green (#82E4BE) primary CTA buttons — ensures high contrast legibility

palette.name: Pure White
palette.usage: Secondary CTA button background, testimonial card surfaces, and high-contrast UI elements

palette.name: Forest Button Text
palette.usage: Secondary button text colour; use for de-emphasised labels and supporting UI text on white/light surfaces

palette.name: Light Mint
palette.usage: Checkmark icons and positive-signal UI indicators — slightly desaturated variant of the primary mint, used for confirmatory iconography

colours.proportion_rule: 65% background darks (#111111, #1B1B1B), 20% text/neutral (#F0E8DA, #FFFFFF), 10% primary accent (#82E4BE), 5% supporting tones (#353535, #416E63, #78DCB4)

backgrounds.light_variant: Warm cream #F0E8DA solid or white #FFFFFF surface for testimonial cards and secondary UI elements
backgrounds.dark_variant: Solid #111111 primary canvas with #1B1B1B elevated surface for interactive components

borders_and_rules.application: Input field borders and card/component edges on dark surfaces

decorative_elements: Inline SVG national flag icons (EU, Danish) used as trust badges — circular/rectangular, full-colour, decorative only
Scrolling ticker/marquee strip of social proof savings claims — horizontal animated banner in high contrast
UI mockup cards embedded in content (PDF document mock, pricing comparison table mock, notification mock) — flat, sharp-cornered, dark-surfaced

iconography.colour_usage: Icons use brand mint variants (#78DCB4, #82E4BE) for positive/confirmatory signals; gold (#C8A45A) for heart/loyalty; red (#C60C30) for flag/national identity. Brand UI icons default to mint family.

data_visualisation.chart_aesthetic: Flat bar/price progression display using text-based stat rows on dark #111111 or #1B1B1B surface. No gridlines or axes visible — data presented as labelled value pairs (year + DKK amount). Clean, high-contrast, minimal. Numbers in #F0E8DA or #82E4BE on dark ground.
data_visualisation.stat_callout_format: Large bold DKK number in #82E4BE or #F0E8DA (Bricolage Grotesque Variable, weight 700, ~48px+), with small muted label below in body text size. Savings amounts displayed with bold emphasis against dark card surface.

brand_marks.logo_placement_convention: Top-left in navigation header; centered on standalone social/cover assets

brand_guardrails.avoid: Gradients of any kind — no purple-to-teal, no multi-stop colour fades
brand_guardrails.instead: Use solid #111111 or #1B1B1B dark backgrounds with flat #82E4BE mint accent elements only

brand_guardrails.avoid: Rounded corners on cards, sections, or container blocks
brand_guardrails.instead: Use sharp 0px corner radius for all layout containers and cards; reserve full pill-radius exclusively for buttons and input fields

brand_guardrails.avoid: Light or white primary backgrounds — Inzure is a dark-first brand
brand_guardrails.instead: Default to #111111 canvas with #1B1B1B surface elevation; use #F0E8DA or #FFFFFF only for small UI components or testimonial cards

brand_guardrails.avoid: Multiple competing accent colours — do not combine mint, gold, and red as brand accents
brand_guardrails.instead: Use #82E4BE as the sole brand accent; restrict #78DCB4 to confirmatory icons only; exclude flag/badge colours (#C8A45A, #C60C30) from brand compositions

brand_guardrails.avoid: Decorative textures, grain overlays, or geometric background patterns
brand_guardrails.instead: Maintain flat, clean dark surfaces with no texture — the contrast between #111111 and #82E4BE is the visual signature

brand_guardrails.avoid: Serif typefaces or display fonts other than Bricolage Grotesque Variable
brand_guardrails.instead: Use Bricolage Grotesque Variable for all headings and display text; fall back to system sans-serif for body copy

generation_suffixes.core: Deep void-black #111111 canvas with charcoal #1B1B1B surface elevation and mint-green #82E4BE accent highlights. Bricolage Grotesque Variable typography in bold weight. Sharp-edged geometric layout with pill-shaped CTA elements. Flat, texture-free surfaces. High-contrast, consumer-advocacy fintech tone.
generation_suffixes.infographic: Deep void-black #111111 background with #1B1B1B raised data panels. Mint-green #82E4BE used for key statistics, callout numbers, and data highlight bars. Warm cream #F0E8DA for supporting labels and body text. Bricolage Grotesque Variable bold for numerical callouts. Sharp-cornered data containers, flat and texture-free. High-contrast, authoritative, trust-signal aesthetic.
generation_suffixes.cover_image: Void-black #111111 full-bleed canvas with mint-green #82E4BE headline emphasis and warm cream #F0E8DA supporting text. Bricolage Grotesque Variable in heavy bold weight for display headlines. Sharp geometric containment shapes with no rounded cards. Flat surface treatment, no gradients or textures. Consumer-advocacy fintech authority tone — direct, bold, and transparent.
generation_suffixes.social_square: Void-black #111111 background with mint-green #82E4BE as the dominant accent colour for key message emphasis. Warm cream #F0E8DA for secondary text. Bricolage Grotesque Variable bold typography. Flat, sharp-cornered graphic elements with pill-shaped badge or label treatments. No texture, no gradients. High-contrast, modern Scandinavian fintech aesthetic.
